---
title: "$19.5 million awarded for the ARTEMIS research study"
date: '2025-10-01'
description: Dr. Turner secured a multi-million dollar grant from the National Institute of Health (NIH) for the [ARTEMIS Study](https://wexnermedical.osu.edu/mediaroom/pressreleaselisting/national-institutes-of-health-funds-artemis-research).
---
